title: phyllanthus dracaenoides
intro: Phyllanthus dracaenoides, also known as the Croton of the East Indies, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and anti-cancer properties. The health benefits of Phyllanthus dracaenoides include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and aid in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
